risk_if_not_implemented: Without Risk Framing, security risks may go unmanaged, resulting in uncontrolled exposures and misaligned security investments.

compensating_control_1.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Program (SCRP)
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of security, compliance and resilience governance controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Program (SCRP) (GOV-01) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Risk Framing (RSK-01.1) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the identification and implementation of relevant statutory, regulatory and contractual controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance (CPL-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Risk Framing (RSK-01.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
